description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the owan/corerobotics:latest Docker image with three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage define four jobs: build-lib runs `mkdir build && cd build`, `cmake ..`, `make` and archives the lib directory as a one‑week artifact; build-python-2 runs `mkdir bin`, `mkdir build && cd build`, `cmake -Dpython=2 ..`, `make` and archives lib, lib/python and bin directories; build-python-3 runs the same commands with `-Dpython=3`; build-test runs `mkdir build && cd build`, `cmake -Dtests=true ..`, `make` and archives lib and bin directories. In the test stage add test-lib executing `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/bin/cr-tests` depending on build-test, test-python-2 executing `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/bin/cr-examples --python2` depending on build-python-2, and test-python-3 executing `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/bin/cr-examples --python3` depending on build-python-3. In the deploy stage add deploy-coverage which builds with `mkdir build && cd build`, `cmake -Dreport=true ..`, `cmake --build . --config Debug`, `ctest --output-on-failure` and then runs after_script commands `lcov --capture --directory . --output-file coverage.info`, `lcov --remove coverage.info '/usr/*' --output-file coverage.info`, `lcov --list coverage.info`, and uploads to Codecov via `bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -f coverage.info || echo "Codecov did not collect coverage reports"`, depending on build-lib; and deploy-install which runs `mkdir build && cd build`, `cmake -Dtests=true ..`, `make && make install`, `ldconfig /usr/local/lib`, `cr-tests` depending on build-test.
